summary: REFACTORING VERIFICATION COMPLETE: Tested LogiRent vehicle management after code refactoring. The 866-line vehicles.tsx was split into 4 components (vehicleTypes.ts, VehicleCard.tsx, EditVehicleModal.tsx, NewVehicleModal.tsx). All functionality works correctly post-refactoring.

issues: Route './agency-app/components/*.tsx' missing default export warnings - expected expo-router behavior for non-page components
shadow* style props deprecated warning - use boxShadow instead (non-breaking)
React controlled/uncontrolled input warning in EditVehicleModal - minor React Native Web issue

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful - vehicles.tsx reduced from 866 lines to 116 lines
Component extraction follows good separation of concerns:
- vehicleTypes.ts: Shared types, constants, and styles
- EditVehicleModal.tsx: Full edit modal with photos/documents
All data-testid attributes preserved in new components

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 pytest tests passed + 2 manual API tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All vehicle management features verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test vehicle REFACTOR_VERIFY_UPDATED for API verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vehicle management refactoring verified successful. The 4 new component files under /app/frontend/app/agency-app/components/ are working correctly. Console warnings about missing default exports are expected behavior for non-page components in expo-router.
